concept: Balatro Balatro is a roguelike deck-builder where players strategically play poker hands to score chips and clear "blinds" (rounds), with each hand consuming cards and earning chips based on its poker value and accumulated multipliers. The core system revolves around collecting and synergizing "Joker" cards, which provide unique passive abilities and score modifiers, alongside other card types like Tarot and Planet cards that manipulate the deck or upgrade hand values.
name: Balatro
